category_sources: source_facts.description says Gluon is a static, type-inferred, embeddable language written in Rust; official gluon-lang.org page gives the same positioning.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gluon; official gluon-lang.org page uses the display name Gluon.
docs_sources: Official gluon-lang.org documentation links to the Gluon book, standard library API reference, and Rust API reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/gluon-lang/gluon, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies static typing, type inference, embedding, and Rust; official README describes Gluon as a small statically typed functional language for application embedding.
